interpretation: Conditional design-space sample fractions; not frequencies of real projects and not central estimates

distribution_shapes.triangular: Package modes with the stated lower and upper bounds
distribution_shapes.uniform: Equal density over the same stated lower and upper bounds
distribution_shapes.discrete_endpoints: Equal-weight draws at the stated lower and upper endpoints

windcrete_reinforcement_upper_fractions.0.05: Lower stress cap equal to the pre-existing package mode; it is an audit alternative, not an observed reinforcement rate
windcrete_reinforcement_upper_fractions.0.125: Pre-existing upper stress cap derived from the ActiveFloat assumed-tonne rebar-to-concrete ratio; the underlying ActiveFloat unit remains unresolved
